title: Relationship Manager
description:
Job ID: 1070953

Are you a Relationship Manager who enjoys building long-term client relationships and delivering holistic wealth solutions — not just chasing transactions?

Our client is expanding its Premier Banking business and is looking for experienced Relationship Managers to manage and grow a portfolio of onshore and cross-border clients, offering tailored financial solutions aligned with each client’s life goals.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Conduct consultative financial reviews to understand clients’ financial objectives, risk profiles, and wealth planning needs

  • Build and nurture long-term, trusted relationships with Premier Banking clients through regular engagement and market updates

  • Provide tailored wealth solutions, including:

    • Investments and portfolio advisory

    • Bancassurance and protection planning

    • Secured and unsecured lending solutions

    • Structured and bespoke products where appropriate

  • Partner internal product specialists to deliver best-in-class client outcomes

  • Achieve consistent sales performance while maintaining strong client satisfaction and portfolio quality

  • Contribute to the growth of the Premier Banking franchise through excellent relationship management and client referrals

What We’re Looking For

  • Minimum 3 years of experience as a Relationship Manager in banking or financial services

  • Solid grounding in wealth management, financial planning, and investment advisory

  • Proven ability to manage and grow a client portfolio

  • Exposure to onshore clients or cross-border markets is a strong advantage

  • Client-centric mindset with strong communication and relationship-building skills

  • Motivated, disciplined, and driven to build a sustainable long-term career in wealth management

Why This Role

  • Opportunity to manage high-quality Premier clients, including offshore relationships

  • Strong platform, structured support, and brand credibility

  • Balanced focus on relationship quality and revenue performance

  • Clear career runway within the Premier / Wealth Banking segment

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. However, all applications will be retained in our resume bank for future opportunities. Your application will be processed in line with our company’s Privacy Policy.
https://goodjobcreations.com.sg/en/privacy-policy/

EA Personnel Name: Gabriel Tan
